summary: iter299 backend+frontend testing of notify_owner_multichannel multi-recipient aggregation and Settings 'المالك' relabel. Backend: 2 new tests (notify_multichannel_iter299) + 30 regression = 32/32 PASS. Confirmed: whatsapp/email recipients pooled from OWNER_ALERT_PHONE + tenants.owner_phone/owner_email + users with role in [super_admin, admin, owner, manager, branch_manager], cashier role excluded, empty phone/email skipped, dedup preserved, result.whatsapp_recipients & result.email_recipients returned. Also validated no exception when tenant_id=None and WhatsApp disconnected. Frontend: Settings > المستخدمين tab shows role badge 'المالك' next to admin@maestroegp.com (verified in screenshot). No 'ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED' for localhost:9999 in preview browser console — BiometricDevices.js host-check gate works.
action_items: NOTE (not a bug): The seeded user admin@maestroegp.com has display-name 'مدير النظام'. Task says 'مدير النظام' should not appear anywhere on the users page; the ROLE BADGE is correctly 'المالك', but the user's own name field remains 'مدير النظام'. If main agent wants zero visibility of that phrase, rename that seeded user's `name` field to something like 'المالك' or 'صاحب المشروع' in seed script. Purely optional; code changes are correct as scoped.
critical_code_review_comments: notify_owner_multichannel: user_q includes 'phone': {'$exists': True, '$ne': ''} but doesn't filter '$ne': null — users with phone=None still pass exists filter and get appended (though u.get('phone') null-check saves it). Consider {'phone': {'$type': 'string', '$ne': ''}} for tighter query.
Same function has no upper cap on recipient count — a tenant with hundreds of managers would send hundreds of WhatsApp messages per shift close. Consider a soft-cap (e.g., 20) + log warning.

phones list may include values with different formats (with/without '+') — dedup is on raw strip, not on normalized E.164. Suggest deduping AFTER _phone_to_e164 conversion to prevent same number sent twice under different formats.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 (tenant admin used for frontend)
seed_data_creation: Test tenant 'test_notify_iter299' + 6 test users created and cleaned up in module teardown. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: notify_owner_multichannel now returns {bell, whatsapp, whatsapp_recipients, email, email_recipients}. Test stubs WhatsApp send_message + send_system_email so no external I/O in preview. Frontend confirmed: Settings > المستخدمين tab (radix TabsTrigger value='staff') renders 'المالك' badge for admin role, and add-user SelectItem uses same t('المالك'). BiometricDevices skips localhost probe on cloud hostnames — zero ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED noise observed in a 10s console capture.
